description: Validation corpus for the file-ingest e2e. Each entry is one source file parsed by the real LocalFileParser, then a golden query that must retrieve it as the top hit. Text-form only (no OCR) so the suite stays green offline. Extend by adding a file + entry; the e2e is data-driven from this manifest.

documents.query: how long until the password reset link expires
how many annual leave days do full-time employees get
submit expense invoice for reimbursement within how many days
collect laptop and badge and attend orientation onboarding
how to report a security incident data breach
how many days per week can employees work remotely
what is the daily meal allowance per diem for travel
